ham.subject: Transaction Alert: $500.00 Debited from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear John,

We are writing to inform you that a transaction of $500.00 was debited from your account (Account ending 1234) on 07/04/2026 at 10:15 AM. This amount was withdrawn for "Online Purchase".

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our fraud prevention team immediately by calling 1-800-123-4567 or by visiting <URL>.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Customer Support Team
XYZ Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: Scholarship Application Approval Pending
spam.body:
Dear Jane,

Congratulations! Your application for the XYZ University Scholarship has been approved. To finalize the award, we require additional documentation.

Please upload the following documents at <URL> by 09/04/2026:
- Official transcript
- Proof of income
- Recommendation letter

Failure to comply may result in forfeiture of the scholarship.

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Dr. John Smith
Dean of Admissions
XYZ University
